articles.title: Drake Maye gives a vote of confidence for Will Campbell after playoff struggles
articles.description:
"I think he’s got a little bit of extra motivation for himself to prove to us and prove to himself he can be one of the best players in this league at his position.”

The post Drake Maye gives a vote of confidence for Will Campbell after playoff struggles appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Drake Maye supports Will Campbell's potential after recent playoff challenges.
Campbell aims to prove himself as a top NFL offensive lineman.
Increased motivation may enhance the Patriots' offensive line performance.

articles.title: 2 women attempt to swim from Marblehead to Scituate to qualify for Ireland marathon swims
articles.description:
The swimmers were met with wind and choppy water, causing their 18-mile swim to stop short.

The post 2 women attempt to swim from Marblehead to Scituate to qualify for Ireland marathon swims appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two women attempted an 18-mile swim from Marblehead to Scituate for marathon qualification.
The swim was halted due to challenging wind and choppy water conditions.
This event highlights local swimming challenges and conditions affecting marathon training in Boston.

articles.title: Preservation efforts ramp up as Swansea Friends Meeting House is named among nation’s most endangered historic sites
articles.description:
A Somerset preservation group recently secured its largest grant yet as restoration efforts continue at the state’s oldest surviving Quaker meeting house.

The post Preservation efforts ramp up as Swansea Friends Meeting House is named among nation’s most endangered historic sites appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Swansea Friends Meeting House named among nation's most endangered historic sites.
Somerset preservation group secures largest grant yet for restoration efforts.
Restoration will preserve Massachusetts' oldest surviving Quaker meeting house for future generations.
